---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for VeilPass
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you're facing or the use case you need to address.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
Include API suggestions, CLI flag ideas, or UI mockups if applicable.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

- How would this feature benefit you and others?
- Are there any security implications to consider?
- Would this require changes to the core library, CLI, API, or frontend?
- Links to similar features in other tools (if applicable)

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have technical insights on how this could be implemented:

- Which crate/module would be affected?
- Any new dependencies needed?
- Breaking changes to existing APIs?
